mapper.sql: SELECT a.prvc_hstry_sn , a.task_sys_se_cd , a.rqstr_ip_addr , a.rqstr_id , a.menu_sn , a.cntn_dt , a.qna_sql_cn , a.prvc_incl_yn , a.prcs_nocs , a.dwnld_yn , a.dwnld_rsn , a.flfmt_task_nm , a.reg_dt , a.rgtr_id , a.mdfcn_dt , a.mdfr_id , a.prvc_prcs_artcl_cn FROM kids_own.tb_ca_l_cntn_info_log a /* 공통_개인정보이력 */ WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY a.prvc_hstry_sn DESC
